root_text.an4.130:1.1: “Cattārome, bhikkhave, acchariyā abbhutā dhammā raññe cakkavattimhi.
root_text.an4.130:1.3: Sace, bhikkhave, khattiyaparisā rājānaṁ cakkavattiṁ dassanāya upasaṅkamati, dassanenapi sā attamanā hoti.
root_text.an4.130:1.4: Tatra ce rājā cakkavattī bhāsati, bhāsitenapi sā attamanā hoti.
root_text.an4.130:1.5: Atittāva, bhikkhave, khattiyaparisā hoti, atha rājā cakkavattī tuṇhī bhavati.
root_text.an4.130:2.1: Sace, bhikkhave, brāhmaṇaparisā rājānaṁ cakkavattiṁ dassanāya upasaṅkamati, dassanenapi sā attamanā hoti.
root_text.an4.130:2.2: Tatra ce rājā cakkavattī bhāsati, bhāsitenapi sā attamanā hoti.
root_text.an4.130:2.3: Atittāva, bhikkhave, brāhmaṇaparisā hoti, atha rājā cakkavattī tuṇhī bhavati.
root_text.an4.130:3.1: Sace, bhikkhave, gahapatiparisā rājānaṁ cakkavattiṁ dassanāya upasaṅkamati, dassanenapi sā attamanā hoti.
root_text.an4.130:3.2: Tatra ce rājā cakkavattī bhāsati, bhāsitenapi sā attamanā hoti.
root_text.an4.130:3.3: Atittāva, bhikkhave, gahapatiparisā hoti, atha rājā cakkavattī tuṇhī bhavati.
root_text.an4.130:4.1: Sace, bhikkhave, samaṇaparisā rājānaṁ cakkavattiṁ dassanāya upasaṅkamati, dassanenapi sā attamanā hoti.
root_text.an4.130:4.2: Tatra ce rājā cakkavattī bhāsati, bhāsitenapi sā attamanā hoti.
root_text.an4.130:4.3: Atittāva, bhikkhave, samaṇaparisā hoti, atha rājā cakkavattī tuṇhī bhavati.
root_text.an4.130:4.4: Ime kho, bhikkhave, cattāro acchariyā abbhutā dhammā raññe cakkavattimhi.
root_text.an4.130:5.1: Evamevaṁ kho, bhikkhave, cattāro acchariyā abbhutā dhammā ānande.
root_text.an4.130:5.3: Sace, bhikkhave, bhikkhuparisā ānandaṁ dassanāya upasaṅkamati, dassanenapi sā attamanā hoti.
root_text.an4.130:5.4: Tatra ce ānando dhammaṁ bhāsati, bhāsitenapi sā attamanā hoti.
root_text.an4.130:5.5: Atittāva, bhikkhave, bhikkhuparisā hoti, atha ānando tuṇhī bhavati.
root_text.an4.130:6.1: Sace, bhikkhave, bhikkhuniparisā …pe… sace, bhikkhave, upāsakaparisā …pe… sace, bhikkhave, upāsikāparisā ānandaṁ dassanāya upasaṅkamati, dassanenapi sā attamanā hoti.
root_text.an4.130:6.2: Tatra ce ānando dhammaṁ bhāsati, bhāsitenapi sā attamanā hoti.
root_text.an4.130:6.3: Atittāva, bhikkhave, upāsikāparisā hoti, atha ānando tuṇhī bhavati.
root_text.an4.130:6.4: Ime kho, bhikkhave, cattāro acchariyā abbhutā dhammā ānande”ti.
root_text.an4.130:7.2: dve ca nānā dve ca honti;

translation_text.an4.130:0.3: Incredible Things About the Wheel-Turning Monarch
translation_text.an4.130:1.1: “Mendicants, there are these four incredible and amazing things about a wheel-turning monarch.
translation_text.an4.130:1.3: If an assembly of aristocrats goes to see a wheel-turning monarch, they’re uplifted by seeing him
translation_text.an4.130:1.4: and uplifted by hearing him speak.
translation_text.an4.130:1.5: And when he falls silent, they’ve never had enough.
translation_text.an4.130:4.1: or ascetics goes to see a wheel-turning monarch, they’re uplifted by seeing him
translation_text.an4.130:4.2: and uplifted by hearing him speak.
translation_text.an4.130:4.3: And when he falls silent, they’ve never had enough.
translation_text.an4.130:4.4: These are the four incredible and amazing things about a wheel-turning monarch.
translation_text.an4.130:5.1: In the same way, there are these four incredible and amazing things about Ānanda.
translation_text.an4.130:5.3: If an assembly of monks goes to see Ānanda, they’re uplifted by seeing him
translation_text.an4.130:5.4: and uplifted by hearing him speak.
translation_text.an4.130:5.5: And when he falls silent, they’ve never had enough.
translation_text.an4.130:6.1: If an assembly of nuns … laymen … or laywomen goes to see Ānanda, they’re uplifted by seeing him
translation_text.an4.130:6.2: and uplifted by hearing him speak.
translation_text.an4.130:6.3: And when he falls silent, they’ve never had enough.
translation_text.an4.130:6.4: These are the four incredible and amazing things about Ānanda.”
